retrieved_result: Burdock Arctium lappa Prev Next Pause Resume To support our efforts please browse our store (books with medicinal info & subscriptions). Recognized mainly for its burrs, burdock is an interesting biennial plant because it consists primarily of carbohydrates, volatile oils, plant sterols, tannins, and fatty oils. Research
